name: Inter-Task Message Bus
description: Provides a file-based message bus for concurrent agent tasks to communicate during team-mode execution: publishing, reading, and expiring messages, with per-participant inboxes and a shared scratchpad.

Managers/MessageBusManager.cs.content:
class BusMessage
  From: string
  FromSummary: string
  Type: string
  Topic: string
  Body: string
  Mentions: List<string>
  Timestamp: DateTime
  SourceFile: string
  ExpiresAt: DateTime
  L26: IsExpired() -> bool
class BusParticipant
  TaskId: string
  Summary: string
class BusContext
  BusDir: string
  InboxDir: string
  Watcher: FileSystemWatcher?
  PollTimer: DispatcherTimer?
  ParticipantTaskIds: HashSet<string>
  TaskSummaries: Dictionary<string, string>
  Messages: List<BusMessage>
  ProcessedFiles: HashSet<string>
  LastCleanupTime: DateTime
  LastActivityTime: DateTime
  ScratchpadDirty: bool
  LastScratchpadContent: string
class MessageBusManager : IDisposable
  L68: GetSafeProjectName(string projectPath) -> string
  L112: JoinBus(string projectPath, string taskId, string taskSummary) -> void

patterns: File-system-based message passing for process isolation
FileSystemWatcher + poll fallback for message notification
TTL-based message expiry with periodic cleanup
dependencies: Integrated into task prompts via MessageBusBlockTemplate
